videos.description:
Open for details!




Hello everyone! After taking a break from YouTube for a year, I am finally back, and in this video I'm explaining what I've been up to while I've been gone, and what I'm planning on doing :)

I've missed my YouTube family very much, and I'm thankful for everyone who has been patient with me while I've been away.

videos.description:

videos.description:
Before asking where I’ve been, please read the caption! You’ll find all the usual information there as well ☺️




Hello everyone!

So it’s been a while…almost 5 months to be precise! I upload my last video right before my second semester started, and a lot has happened since then. I ended up taking an extra class  (which ended up taking most of my time) in addition to the 3 fairly difficult classes I was already signed up for, so this semester ended up being a lot more challenging than expected

Hello everyone!

Open for FAQ and everything included! ☺️



Hello everyone!

Here’s another video (finally)! This one has been requested for a long time so I hope you’ll find it helpful. Procrastination is something I think we all struggle with at times, so let’s help each other out to deal with it as best as we can!

Hello everyone!

After being sick for a while, I’m finally back with another video. This week I’m bringing you along on some of my study days, showing you how and what I study on my normal days. Hope you enjoy the video! 💕
